debug_info.goal:
α✝ : Type u_1
inst✝⁴ : MeasurableSpace α✝
H : Type u_2
inst✝³ : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝² : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝¹ : CompleteSpace H
α : Type u_3
inst✝ : MeasurableSpace α
E : @ResolutionOfIdentity α inst✝ H inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹
x : H
w₁ w₂ : Set α
h : w₁ ⊆ w₂
⊢ ‖(@ResolutionOfIdentity.measureOf' α inst✝ H inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ E w₁) x‖ ≤
    ‖(@ResolutionOfIdentity.measureOf' α inst✝ H inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ E w₂) x‖

    · by_cases hw₁ : MeasurableSet w₁
      · rw [← inter_eq_self_of_subset_left h, E.m_Inter' hw₁ hw₂]
        let P := E.measureOf' w₁
        have hP : IsOrthogonalProjection P := E.isOrthogonalProjection' w₁
        have h_norm (v : H) : ‖P v‖ ≤ ‖v‖ := by
          have : ‖P v‖ ^ 2 ≤ ‖v‖ ^ 2 := by
            rw [← inner_self_eq_norm_sq_to_K, ← inner_self_eq_norm_sq_to_K]
            have h_eq : ⟪P v, v⟫_ℂ = ‖P v‖ ^ 2 := by
              rw [hP.1] at *
              nth_rw 2 [hP.2]
              rw [ContinuousLinearMap.adjoint_inner_right, ← ContinuousLinearMap.mul_apply, ← hP.1, inner_self_eq_norm_sq_to_K]
            rw [← sub_nonneg, ← re_sub, ← inner_sub_left]
            have h_proj_compl : IsOrthogonalProjection (1 - P) := ⟨by
                rw [sub_mul, mul_sub, mul_one, one_mul, hP.1, sub_sub_cancel]
              , by rw [star_sub, star_one, hP.2]⟩
            have h_inner_compl : ⟪(1 - P) v, v⟫_ℂ = ‖(1 - P) v‖ ^ 2 := by
              rw [h_proj_compl.1] at *
              nth_rw 2 [h_proj_compl.2]
              rw [ContinuousLinearMap.adjoint_inner_right, ← ContinuousLinearMap.mul_apply, ← h_proj_compl.1, inner_self_eq_norm_sq_to_K]
            rw [sub_apply, one_apply, inner_sub_left, h_eq, h_inner_compl]
            exact (sq_nonneg _).trans (le_of_eq (re_ofReal _).symm)
          exact Real.le_sqrt_of_sq_le (by positivity) (by positivity) this
        exact h_norm _
      · simp [E.not_measurable' hw₁]
    · simp [E.not_measurable' hw₂]
      by_cases hw₁ : MeasurableSet w₁
      · -- This case (w₁ measurable, w₂ not, w₁ ⊆ w₂) contradicts the monotonicity of the constructed measure
        -- unless E(w₁) = 0. We assume the context implies this or accept sorry for this edge case.
        sorry
      · simp [E.not_measurable' hw₁]

          _ ≤ 1 * ‖E.measureOf' w₂ x‖ := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right h_norm (norm_nonneg _)
          _ = ‖E.measureOf' w₂ x‖ := one_mul _

      · rw [← inter_eq_left.mpr h, E.m_Inter' h₁ h₂]
        let P := E.measureOf' w₁
        have hP : IsOrthogonalProjection P := E.isOrthogonalProjection' w₁
        let y := E.measureOf' w₂ x
        have : ‖P y‖ ^ 2 ≤ ‖P y‖ * ‖y‖ := by
          rw [pow_two, norm_sq_eq_inner]
          nth_rw 1 [← hP.1, ContinuousLinearMap.mul_apply]
          rw [ContinuousLinearMap.adjoint_inner_left, hP.2, ← hP.1, ContinuousLinearMap.mul_apply]
          exact re_inner_le_norm _ _
        by_cases hy : ‖P y‖ = 0
        · rw [hy]; exact norm_nonneg _
        · exact le_of_mul_le_mul_left this (lt_of_le_of_ne (norm_nonneg _) (Ne.symm hy))
      · rw [E.not_measurable' h₁]; simp; exact norm_nonneg _
    · rw [E.not_measurable' h₂]; simp
      sorry -- The statement is false for non-measurable supersets in general

by_cases hw₂ : MeasurableSet w₂
    · by_cases hw₁ : MeasurableSet w₁
      · rw [← E.m_Inter' hw₁ hw₂, inter_eq_left.mpr h]
        exact (E.isOrthogonalProjection' _).norm_apply_le_self _
      · rw [E.not_measurable' hw₁]; simp
    · rw [E.not_measurable' hw₂]; simp
      by_cases hw₁ : MeasurableSet w₁
      · sorry
      · rw [E.not_measurable' hw₁]; simp

by_cases h₁ : MeasurableSet w₁
    · by_cases h₂ : MeasurableSet w₂
      · rw [← E.m_Inter' h₁ h₂, inter_eq_self_of_subset_left h]
        rcases (IsStarProjection_iff _).mp (E.isOrthogonalProjection' w₁) with ⟨K, hK, rfl⟩
        simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.mul_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_comp',
          ContinuousLinearMap.coe_subtypeL', Function.comp_apply, Submodule.coe_subtypeL',
          Submodule.norm_coe]
        exact K.norm_orthogonalProjection_le _
      · sorry
    · rw [E.not_measurable' h₁]
      simp

by_cases h₂ : MeasurableSet w₂
    · by_cases h₁ : MeasurableSet w₁
      · rw [← Set.inter_eq_left.mpr h, E.m_Inter' h₁ h₂, ContinuousLinearMap.mul_apply]
        let P := E.measureOf' w₁
        have hP := E.isOrthogonalProjection' w₁
        let y := E.measureOf' w₂ x
        have : ‖P y‖ ≤ ‖y‖ := by
          by_cases hy : ‖P y‖ = 0; · simp [hy]
          apply le_of_mul_le_mul_right _ (lt_of_le_of_ne (norm_nonneg _) (Ne.symm hy))
          rw [sq, ← norm_sq_eq_inner, hP.2, ContinuousLinearMap.adjoint_inner_right,
            ← ContinuousLinearMap.mul_apply, ← hP.1, ContinuousLinearMap.mul_apply]
          exact real_inner_le_norm _ _
        exact this
      · simp [E.not_measurable' h₁]
    · simp [E.not_measurable' h₂]; sorry

by_cases h₁ : MeasurableSet w₁
    · by_cases h₂ : MeasurableSet w₂
      · rw [← E.m_Inter' h₁ h₂, Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left h]
        exact (E.isOrthogonalProjection' w₁).1.norm_apply_le_norm _
      · simp [E.not_measurable' h₂]; sorry
    · simp [E.not_measurable' h₁, norm_nonneg]

by_cases hw₁ : MeasurableSet w₁; swap
    · simp [E.not_measurable' hw₁]
    by_cases hw₂ : MeasurableSet w₂; swap
    · simp [E.not_measurable' hw₂]; sorry
    rw [← E.m_Inter' hw₁ hw₂, Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left h]
    let P := E.measureOf' w₁
    let y := E.measureOf' w₂ x
    have hP : IsOrthogonalProjection P := E.isOrthogonalProjection' w₁
    by_cases hy : ‖P y‖ = 0
    · rw [hy]; exact norm_nonneg _
    · have : ‖P y‖ ^ 2 = re ⟪P y, y⟫_ℂ := by
        rw [pow_two, inner_self_eq_norm_mul_norm, ← hP.1, ContinuousLinearMap.mul_apply,
          ContinuousLinearMap.adjoint_inner_left (A := P), hP.2]
      have : ‖P y‖ ^ 2 ≤ ‖P y‖ * ‖y‖ := by rw [this]; exact re_inner_le_norm (P y) y
      exact (mul_le_mul_left_of_pos (lt_of_le_of_ne (norm_nonneg _) (Ne.symm hy))).mp this

by_cases h₁ : MeasurableSet w₁; swap; · simp [E.not_measurable' h₁]
    by_cases h₂ : MeasurableSet w₂; swap; · simp [E.not_measurable' h₂]; sorry
    have : E.measureOf' w₁ = E.measureOf' w₁ * E.measureOf' w₂ := by
      rw [← E.m_Inter' h₁ h₂, Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_left h]
    rw [this, ContinuousLinearMap.mul_apply]
    let P := E.measureOf' w₁; have hP := E.isOrthogonalProjection' w₁
    generalize E.measureOf' w₂ x = v
    by_cases hv : ‖P v‖ = 0; · simp [hv]
    refine (mul_le_mul_right (lt_of_le_of_ne (norm_nonneg _) (Ne.symm hv))).mp ?_
    rw [← sq, norm_sq_eq_inner, hP.2, ContinuousLinearMap.adjoint_def,
        ← ContinuousLinearMap.mul_apply, ← hP.1, ← hP.2]
    exact le_trans (IsROrC.re_le_norm _) (norm_inner_le_norm _ _)
